description: A launch director is managing the final countdown for a rocket launch. They must monitor all systems and give the final 'go' for launch.

nodes.task_description: Monitor the countdown clock and the status of all key systems (propulsion, avionics, range safety) on the mission control dashboard.

expected_outcome.value: Agent observes all systems are 'green' or 'go'.

nodes.task_description: Conduct the final 'go/no-go' poll with all lead engineers.

expected_outcome.value: Agent receives a 'go' from all stations.

nodes.task_description: At T-minus 10 seconds, give the final command to enable the automated launch sequence.

expected_outcome.value: Agent issues the final 'go for launch' command.
